title: [TaCZ] Tacz Bullet Improvement
description: This mod fixes the bullet system for Timeless And Classics Zero
body:
TaczFix is a simple addon mod for TACZ (Timeless and Classics Zero) that replaces the ballistic bullet system with an instant raycast, making guns feel responsive and accurate even on laggy servers.
TACZ has a really cool bullet system that physically travels through the air with custom models and everything, and it looks awesome. The problem is that when you play on a laggy server like Aternos, that bullet travel time stacks on top of the server lag and causes around a 1 second delay before hits register, which makes multiplayer PvP feel really bad. This mod swaps that out with an instant raycast so the moment you pull the trigger it checks for a hit right away, no travel time, no delay. Here's a quick showcase of it in action.
The original TACZ bullet system is still awesome and works great on a good server, this is really just meant for people dealing with lag.
📥 Installation
Install TACZ first if you haven't already, then just drop this mod into your mods folder alongside it like any other mod. No configuration needed, it works automatically.
✅ Compatibility

Requires TACZ to be installed
Works on both singleplayer and multiplayer
Recommended for free or low performance servers like Aternos

🐛 Reporting Issues
If something isn't working right, join my Discord server linked on my profile and let me know what happened. Include what version of TACZ you are using and any crash logs if you have them.
